# CWE-940 vulnerable: no origin verification on callback
lang: go
file: CWE-940-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-940: Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel.
// Vulnerable: OAuth callback trusts any redirect without state/origin checks.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func OAuthCallback(db *sqlx.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		code := c.Query("code")
		userID := c.Query("user_id")
		_, err := db.Exec(
			"INSERT INTO oauth_tokens (user_id, code) VALUES ($1, $2)",
			userID, code,
		)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.Redirect(http.StatusFound, "/dashboard")
	}
}
